description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Testing that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions and operating systems concurrently, canceling any in-progress jobs when a new workflow run is triggered. For each job, set up a Miniconda environment with the specified Python version and environment file, install jams, log installed packages, run tests with pytest, and upload coverage to Codecov.
